infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app collects location data in the background to coordinate field deliveries, track route progression, and verify attendance check-ins even when the app is closed or not in use.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location data to verify attendance check-ins and log dispatch coordinates.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app collects location data to coordinate deliveries and field operations.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app requires camera access to scan barcode tags and capture receipt slips for expense logging.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app requires Bluetooth access to connect to thermal ticket printers.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow MMC Agent to access your location to track delivery progress and verify duty check-ins.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow MMC Agent to access the camera to photograph receipts and document papers.
